full_text:
Cheng Xiao (Jiming) 程曉 (季明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Xiao (程曉), styledJiming (季明). Wrote many essay’s now lost, got the post of Overseer abolished. Cheng Xiao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
